seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Maiden Gully and Maidstone. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Maiden Gully vs Maidstone: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Maiden Gully and Maidstone.
heading: Maiden Gully vs Maidstone — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Maiden Gully, Victoria and Maidstone, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Maiden Gully has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Maidstone (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Maiden Gully or Maidstone safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Maiden Gully has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Maidstone scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Maiden Gully scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Maidstone scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Maiden Gully or Maidstone?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Maiden Gully has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
